# Name: # Custom partition table for ESP32 WROOM-32 (4MB Flash)
#   app0/app1: 1.5625MB (0x190000) instead of 1.25MB (0x130000) — +320KB per slot vs default
#   nvs:       32KB  (0x8000)   instead of 20KB  (0x5000)    — +12KB for offline rules
#   spiffs shrunk 0xD0000→0xB0000 (-128KB) to keep total at 4MB.
# ESP-IDF: app partitions MUST start at 0x10000 alignment (64KB). Gap 0x13000–0x1FFFF unused.
# Added coredump partition for panic diagnostics on real ESP32 devices.
